accurate.why: All claims are accurate and consistent with the bill text.

no_hallucinations.why: No fabricated claims; all content grounded in the bill.

states_purpose.why: Clearly identifies the bill as allowing out-of-state appraisers for Interior Department transactions.

changes_to_existing_law.why: Notes that preexisting licensure requirements are overridden for Interior transactions.

exceptions_conditions.why: Accurately describes the three conditions for using out-of-state appraisers.

effective_dates.why: Notes 90-day deadline for public availability (explicitly citing enactment date) and annual reporting.

major_provisions_covered.why: Covers all major provisions including licensing, preference, conditions, public availability, and reporting requirements.

correct_entities.why: Correctly identifies the Secretary of the Interior and Department of the Interior.

correct_figures.why: 90-day deadline and reporting timeline correctly stated.
